languages.text: "Я знала, что ничто человеческое вам не чуждо, мудрейший! Приступим же к угнетению чего-то там!"
"I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"
languages.original_text: "Я знала, что ничто человеческое вам не чуждо, мудрейший! Приступим же к угнетению чего-то там!"

traits.locale_text: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest one! Let us proceed with the depression of whatever-it-was!"
"I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest one! Let us proceed with the depression of whatever-it-was!"
"I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"
"I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"

languages.text: «¡Ya sabía yo que nada humano le era ajeno, oh, sabio entre los sabios! Bueno, vamos a anular el no sé qué central ese!».
languages.original_text: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Ya sabía yo que nada humano le era ajeno, oh, sabio entre los sabios! Bueno, vamos a anular el no sé qué central ese!».

languages.text: “我就知道你懂得所有关于人类的知识。世间最睿智之人啊，咱们这就开始抑制那个什么中枢吧！”
languages.original_text: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"

traits.locale_text: “我就知道你懂得所有关于人类的知识。世间最睿智之人啊，咱们这就开始抑制那个什么中枢吧！”

languages.text: "Ich wusste Euch ist nichts Menschliches fremd, weisester aller Männer! Lasst uns dieses zentrale Ding unterdrücken!"
languages.original_text: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich wusste Euch ist nichts Menschliches fremd, weisester aller Männer! Lasst uns dieses zentrale Ding unterdrücken!"

languages.text: « Je savais bien que les humains n'avaient pas de secret pour vous, ô savant homme ! Procédons sans plus attendre à l'anesthésie de notre système je ne sais quoi ! »
languages.original_text: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"

traits.locale_text: « Je savais bien que les humains n'avaient pas de secret pour vous, ô savant homme ! Procédons sans plus attendre à l'anesthésie de notre système je ne sais quoi ! »

languages.text: "İnsani hiçbir şeyin sana yabancı olmadığını biliyordum ey insanların en bilgesi! Hadi şu merkezî her neyse onu baskılamaya devam edelim!"
languages.original_text: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"

traits.locale_text: "İnsani hiçbir şeyin sana yabancı olmadığını biliyordum ey insanların en bilgesi! Hadi şu merkezî her neyse onu baskılamaya devam edelim!"

languages.text: 「人間に属するものは、あなたにはすべて理解できるものだと知っていた。賢明なあなたよ、さあ、中央の何々を鎮圧しましょう！」
languages.original_text: "I knew that nothing human was alien to you, O wisest of men! Let's get on with suppressing the central whatever it was!"

traits.locale_text: 「人間に属するものは、あなたにはすべて理解できるものだと知っていた。賢明なあなたよ、さあ、中央の何々を鎮圧しましょう！」
